description: A batch of log records with optional shared attributes
name: LogDataObject

common.description: Shared attributes applied to all log records in this batch

timestamp.description: Default Unix timestamp in milliseconds for all logs in the batch

attributes.description: Key-value attributes applied to all logs in this batch

timestamp.description: Unix epoch timestamp in milliseconds when the log event occurred

logtype.description: Log format type for automatic parsing (e.g., nginx, apache, syslog)

attributes.description: Additional key-value attributes for this log record
